data.body: PR opened: https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/pull/685 (Resolves #681, base main). Passed a 4-agent /review (security/quality/context/freeform): PASS. Review added an end-to-end dashboard view-render test (closes the AC3 "renders it" gap); that test surfaced that the factory-default exemption type short_term_hardship has no curated en title (pre-existing; the type renders humanized), so the view test points at incarceration (a titled type). es-US is not a gap — Spanish isn't implemented in the app yet.
